example_analytics.prompt: Pull analytics for the last 7 days. Save to data/analytics/{date}.json. Report notable changes.

example_content_post.prompt: Draft a social post based on GOALS.md and LEARNINGS.md. Read brand-voice-skill.md for voice rules. Post to X and Bluesky. Report what you posted.

conversation_memory.prompt: Extract key decisions from today's logs into LEARNINGS.md. Only add what's NOT already there. Keep under 100 lines.
